name: Dynamic Shoreline Feature
abstract: Feature type for tide-dependent shoreline vectors, encoding shoreline type, water level at capture, tidal datum reference, sensor platform, and spatial/temporal uncertainty. Enables multi-temporal shoreline analysis and supports FMSDI Best Practice 3 (Mind the Gap) and Best Practice 1 (Unified Geospatial Reference). Derived from TCarta FMSDI demonstrator at Hurst Spit using Planet Labs NDWI and Capella SAR data.

sources.title: TCarta D100 — Space-Based Remote Sensing for Intertidal Awareness (Hurst Spit NDWI + SAR demonstrator)
IHO S-32 Hydrographic Dictionary — tidal datum terminology
IHO CATZOC — Category of Zone of Confidence for vertical/horizontal accuracy
